creator: freebsd-bugs@joe.mulloy.me
text:
I'm trying to install Windows 7 in a bhyve VM using chyves. During the phase of the install where Windows unpacks it's files onto the hard disk all the memory in my system is wired, but it's not all going to the ZFS ARC. Perhaps there is a memory leak.

##### Output of loop on output from top #####
